# Step 04: Update Java Version
# Generated by GH Copilot CLI - Spec2Cloud Methodology

## Changes Made

### Parent pom.xml
- Changed `<java.version>8</java.version>` → `<java.version>21</java.version>`

### Environment
- Installed Eclipse Temurin JDK 21.0.10+7 LTS
- JAVA_HOME: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.10.7-hotspot

### Build Verification
- Maven clean compile: SUCCESS with Java 21
- All modules compiled without errors
- Spring Boot 2.7.18 is compatible with Java 21 for compilation
